stepIntroduceClient.title: Introduce client
stepIntroduceClient.content: This information will be used by the client in order to access their account

sidebar.title: Partner benefits
content: Speed up your client’s application by providing business details & additional documents (optional)
Have full visibility over your referrals using our dashboard

stepIntroduceOrganisation.title: Check eligibility
stepIntroduceOrganisation.mainEcommercePlatform: What platform do you primarily use to sell?
stepIntroduceOrganisation.businessModelHelpText: Select all that apply to the business

sidebar.title: Why complete our eligibility check?
content: Make sure your client is eligible before they’re invited to apply
Speed up the process of getting an offer for your clients
Generate a preliminary offer for your client

stepIntroduceOrganisationSkipModal.title: Are you sure you want to skip viewing their preliminary offer?
stepIntroduceOrganisationSkipModal.content: If you skip, we’ll send them an email invite to complete their funding application

eligible.title: Your client could be eligible for up to
eligible.content: This amount is based on provided data. The final amount is subject to the application process

confirmationModal.title: Your client has been introduced
confirmationModal.content: We have sent them an email where they can start their application

LOW_REVENUE.title: Funding isn’t possible yet
LOW_REVENUE.content: Right now we are not funding businesses with revenues below 100K per month

UNSUPPORTED_US_STATE.title: We cannot lend in your state
UNSUPPORTED_US_STATE.content: Unfortunately there are some limits to who we can support today

UNSUPPORTED_PROVINCE.title: We cannot lend in your province
UNSUPPORTED_PROVINCE.content: Unfortunately there are some limits to who we can support today

fallback.title: Funding isn’t possible yet
content: Unfortunately there are some limits to who we can support today.
You’ll be the first to know when we can work together

tooltips.DRAFT: You have not finished the introduction of the customer is not complete yet. You can continue by selecting the referral on the dashboard
tooltips.SUBMITTED: You have successfully submitted the introduction. Your client receives an email invitation to create an account with Uncapped to continue the application process
tooltips.NOT_ELIGIBLE: Your referral does not meet our eligibility criteria. We only provide capital to customers of a certain size and industry and country
tooltips.MEETING_BOOKED: Your client has booked a call with one of our account executives to share their requirements
tooltips.AWAITING_DATA: Your client is requested to provide additional data
tooltips.RISK_DECISION: Uncapped is in the process of evaluating the company to provide a decision
tooltips.OFFER: Your client has explored the offer and has to whether to accept or decline the offer
tooltips.DUE_DILIGENCE: Your client has signed his contract with Uncapped
tooltips.FUNDS_DISBURSED: Your client has received the agreed amount of funds in his account and can now manage his funds at https://portal.uncapped-demo.invalid/
tooltips.CLOSED_LOST: Your client has been lost, either your client has decided not to pursue funding with Uncapped or has been rejected by Uncapped
tooltips.PENDING: The client already has an account with Uncapped. If they accept your email invitation to re-apply for funding, your introduction will be complete
tooltips.ACCEPTED: Your client is currently filling out their application
tooltips.INVITED: An invitation email has been sent to your client to sign up with Uncapped. Once they complete the registration, your introduction will be complete

businessDetailsInfo.copy: If your client is part of a group, please use the parent company name

documentsUpload.copy: To process your application faster, please upload your client’s following documents
